prompt: Enhance the contrast and saturation of the dust lane highlighted in the reference mask to emphasize galactic structure, while keeping the rest of the image unchanged.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Using image 2 as a mask to define the target region, enhance the contrast and saturation specifically of the dark dust lane visible within this masked area, aiming to emphasize the galactic structure. All other parts of image 1 must remain unchanged.
